mapping_description: pvenketa : 06/11/2014 Modfying this mapping as part of Q3FY15 by SC-LSS

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(CXMABB.UOM),CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(CXMABB.ITEM_TYPE),CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.ITEM_NUMBER,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.ORG_CODE,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.ITEM_REVISION,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
CXMABB.ITEM_PRICE,
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.CURRENCY_CODE,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.PLANNING_CODE,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
CXMABB.TRANSMISSION_DATE,
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.PROCESS_STATUS,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.BOM_PROCESS_FLAG,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.BOM_PROCESS_STATUS,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
CXMABB.CREATION_DATE,
CXMABB.CREATED_BY,
CXMABB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
CXMABB.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CXMABB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
CXMABB.REQUEST_ID,
CXMABB.FLB_COST,
REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(CXMABB.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID),CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
TRIM(CXMABB.BOM_REF_ID),
TRIM(CXMABB.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID),
TRIM(CXMABB.SO_NUMBER),
TRIM(CXMABB.SO_LINE_NUMBER),
TRIM(CXMABB.SO_MAJOR_LINE_NUMBER),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.CISCO_DUNS,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.PARTNER_DUNS,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(TRIM(CXMABB.PO_NUMBER),CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
CXMABB.BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY,
CXMABB.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMABB.GLOBAL_NAME,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
CXMABB.DF_FEE_COST,
/* pvenketa : 06/11/2014 added as part of SC-LSS Q3FY15 */
TRIM(CXMABB.ATTRIBUTE6)
/* End of Changes */
FROM
CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM CXMABB
WHERE 
CXMABB.PROCESS_STATUS = 'BOM_PROCESS_SUCCESS'
/*AND CXMABB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')*/
